steps.t: A challenge bell can be found to the south-east of Mêdi in the Lower Ward.
Another challenge bell can be found further to the south-east in the Lower Ward.
The last challenge bell can be found to the north of the previous one, in the Lower Ward.
Mûtahir stands near the last challenge bell.
Mêdi is to the west of the last challenge bell, in the Lower Ward.
